mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, destination, start_date, end_date, days, reason, created_at, updated_at FROM business_trip_record WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND (reason IS NULL OR reason NOT LIKE CONCAT(, '%')) ORDER BY start_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO business_trip_record (employee_id, destination, start_date, end_date, reason) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{destination}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{reason})
mapper.update: UPDATE business_trip_record SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, destination = #{destination}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, reason = #{reason} WHERE id = #{id}
